title: Plots you would have liked for an episode
display_title: Plots you would have liked for an episode
wikitext:
[]: Plots you would have liked for an episode             Quote Post by Darkwing » Wed Nov 21, 2012 6:35 pm I'm just wondering. Does anyone have anything they felt they wish had been done for an episodes plot in Eva? I don't mean anything big, just a little thing for an episode or two. For me, I would have liked an Episode where Asuka and Rei have to work together, just the two of them. They struck me as having an interesting dynamic, and we really never got to see how it would have worked with an episode focusing on them.

[]:             Quote Post by ohnasti » Wed Nov 21, 2012 7:29 pm I would of like to see Shinji grab Asuka while the kiss, or F*** her, no joke. i really would of like to see what would happen if that were to happen.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Wed Nov 21, 2012 7:41 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Nov 21, 2012 7:55 pm ohnasti wrote: I would of like to see Shinji grab Asuka while the kiss, or F*** her, no joke. i really would of like to see what would happen if that were to happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Wed Nov 21, 2012 8:05 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ohnasti » Wed Nov 21, 2012 8:12 pm esselfortium wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Nov 21, 2012 8:21 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Wed Nov 21, 2012 9:15 pm ohnasti wrote: I would of like to see Shinji grab Asuka while the kiss, or F*** her, no joke. i really would of like to see what would happen if that were to happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Redtophat » Thu Nov 22, 2012 12:45 am Kaji episode, the dude was great and deserved more screen time, maybe with an episode where he taught Shinji how to be a man through attempting to pick up women around town and then having Asuka be the final test.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Nov 22, 2012 12:54 am Misato and Pen Pen's beer binge.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Nov 22, 2012 12:59 am I kinda wish there had been a whole episode from Gendo's perspective, perhaps some random battle of the week during the action arc. Early hints of his relationship with Ritsuko could be slipped in subtly, some early Seele maneuvering, bullshitting with Fuyu (about something that has nothing to do with work), intimidating random techs, sneaking onto the command bridge while the bunnies are goofing off and just listening silently until they notice, a view of how he lives when he's not at work, maybe a short conversation with Rei... all good stuff. In the background you've got all the drama of Misato's latest crazy plan and the pilots bickering over whatever bullshit after a seemingly easy victory.

[]:             Quote Post by Jadley » Thu Nov 22, 2012 1:18 am more episodes from the happy alter-reality.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Nov 22, 2012 2:31 am ohnasti wrote: I would of like to see Shinji grab Asuka while the kiss, or F*** her, no joke. i really would of like to see what would happen if that were to happen.

[]:             Quote Post by jimmiel » Thu Nov 22, 2012 3:57 am A slice of life episode centring on the best Eva girl, Ramiel. She acts tsundere towards Zeruel, calls onii-chan and gets advice from Kaworu on how to be more honest with her feelings. Ramiel ends up giving Zeruel some sort of present, saying, "it's not like I like you or anything!" Sachiel makes fun of her and the episode ends with everyone laughing as Ramiel comicalls drills Sachiel's head.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Thu Nov 22, 2012 7:28 am An episode where Nerv personnel get manditory psych evaluations. Hiliarity ensues. In the end we find out the only truly well adjusted person at Nerv is some janitor working the graveyard shift. Gendo has him reassigned. An Episode that shows an angel attack fully the POV of Toji, Kensuke, and Hikari. The only time we see the children or Nerv is when they do.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Nov 22, 2012 7:54 am A beach-Episode of course.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Thu Nov 22, 2012 8:44 am robersora wrote: A beach-Episode of course.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu Nov 22, 2012 8:57 am robersora wrote: A beach-Episode of course.

[]:             Quote Post by Redtophat » Thu Nov 22, 2012 12:27 pm Fireball wrote: But there was one in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Nov 22, 2012 1:02 pm hahaha And Asuka's like: "BAKA Shinji! It clearly is red! Kimochi warui!!!"
